title: Run Request Specification
description: Schema for a minimal BYO harness run request. Captures all metadata required for reproducible replay of an evaluation run.

model_matrix.description: Model matrix — list of model IDs to evaluate against

evaluator_refs.description: Evaluator references — list of evaluator IDs to use

prompt_digest.description: Content digest of the resolved prompt spec (sha256:<hex>)

dataset_digest.description: Content digest of the dataset used (sha256:<hex>)

evaluator_digest.description: Content digest of the evaluator config used (sha256:<hex>)

harness_version.description: Version identifier of the harness adapter used for execution

sampling_config.description: Sampling configuration for the model (temperature, top_p, etc.)

trials.description: Number of trials per case for variance measurement

timeouts.description: Timeout limits per case and per run

artifact_backend_config.description: Configuration for the artifact storage backend
